topWPAPlays.description: Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Kazuma Okamoto hits a grand slam (21) to right field. Nathan Lukes scores. George Springer scores. Daulton Varsho scores.

Drew Gilbert challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Drew Gilbert walks.
